title: [MTR] Mezzo's Money & Balance Addon
description: Connects Mezzo's Money mod with the MTR mod. Now you are able to charge your balance with real money; not emeralds
body:
# Welcome to Mezzo's Money and Balance Addon for the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod Are you tired of charging your balance with emeralds in the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod? Emeralds are looking boring: especially when playing on roleplay or build servers where everything is used to look realistic. **This mod fixes your problems!** 🔥This mod connects the MTR mod with Mezzo's Money so you are able to charge your travel balance (from the MTR mod) with real looking money.🔥
How the money looks like ![Money](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9305f9e477d0acc6a7aebc1cdade5654ae5d2c1b.png)
## Usage 1. Get the "Ticket Machine" out of the redstone creative tab (Block is not craftable yet). 2. Right click the block: a GUI opens 3. Type in the amount you want to charge to your travel balance (MTR) and hit "Charge" 4. The money is moving from your BankAccount to your travel balance. 5. Now you can travel through your train world
How the GUI looks like ![How the GUI looks like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/292b3b54442a53202febc1d556d898393b5ceb78_0.webp)
## Dependencies The mod requires following mods in order to work: - MTR (every stable version should work: also MTR 3) [Download here](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) - Mezzo's Money Mod (latest stable) [Download with Modrinth here](https://modrinth.com/mod/mezzos-money-mod) or [Download with Curseforge here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mezzos-money-mod) **_NTE IS NOT REQUIRED_** ## Join my Discord to REPORT BUGS and chat with our community

Other information Due to the Minecraft scoreboard's refresh rate, the mtr scoreboard must be displayed for Team dark_auqa permanently. Otherwise the mod cannot display the correct travel balance. By default, it is not visible to any player unless they switch to Team dark_auqa using a command. So it shouldn't bother anyone.
